page: Amazon Web Services g7e.24xlarge is a graphics-intensive server powered by the AWS Nitro hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture with an Intel Xeon 8559C processor, providing 96 dedicated vCPUs across 48 physical cores running at 2.4 GHz with a 320 MB L3 cache. The system is equipped with 1024.0 GB of DDR5 memory operating at 6 GHz, yielding 10.67 GB of RAM per core.

For accelerated workloads, the server bundles four NVIDIA Blackwell RTX Pro 6000 GPUs, delivering a combined 384 GB of VRAM. Local storage consists of 7600 GB of NVMe SSD capacity. The network interface provides a baseline bandwidth of 400 Gbps.

Benchmark results indicate top-tier performance across multiple domains. Multi-threaded bzip3 decompression, Geekbench single-core and multi-core scores, and Geekbench ray tracing all rank in the top 10%. Passmark CPU and database operations also achieve top-tier status. Large-scale LLM inference benchmarks, including prompt processing and text generation for 135M, 7B, and 70B models, consistently place in the top 10% of tested systems.

Given the high density of DDR5 memory, massive local NVMe SSD storage, and quad Blackwell GPUs, this server offers high resource density for demanding enterprise tasks. It is designed for workloads such as large language model inference, ray tracing, database operations, and high-throughput data processing.
description: Amazon Web Services g7e.24xlarge is a high-density, graphics-intensive server designed for demanding compute and acceleration workloads. Powered by the AWS Nitro hypervisor, it features an Intel Xeon 8559C processor with 96 dedicated vCPUs, 1024.0 GB of DDR5 memory, and 7600 GB of local NVMe SSD storage. The server is equipped with four NVIDIA Blackwell RTX Pro 6000 GPUs, providing a total of 384 GB of VRAM. Network performance is supported by a 400 Gbps baseline bandwidth. Benchmark data shows top-tier performance in multi-core processing, ray tracing, database operations, and LLM inference across small, medium, and large models. This hardware profile makes the server highly suitable for large-scale AI inference, graphics rendering, and intensive database workloads.
og_description: Amazon Web Services g7e.24xlarge is a graphics-intensive server featuring 96 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 1024 GB DDR5 RAM, four NVIDIA Blackwell GPUs with 384 GB VRAM, and 7600 GB local NVMe SSD storage.
meta_description: Amazon Web Services g7e.24xlarge is a graphics-intensive server with 96 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 1024 GB DDR5 RAM, and four NVIDIA Blackwell GPUs.
tagline: An accelerated server combining quad Blackwell GPUs, 1024 GB DDR5 memory, and 7600 GB NVMe storage for intensive AI and graphics workloads.
bullet_points: Four NVIDIA Blackwell RTX Pro 6000 GPUs with 384 GB total VRAM
96 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs and 1024 GB of high-speed DDR5 memory
7600 GB of local NVMe SSD storage and 400 Gbps baseline network bandwidth
Top-tier benchmark performance in LLM inference, ray tracing, and database operations
Optimized for large-scale AI inference, graphics rendering, and data-intensive applications
